criteria.absence_policy: Record an audited absence; do not fabricate a relationship.

criteria.absence_policy: Record an audited absence if this snapshot has no range endpoint.

criteria.absence_policy: Record an audited absence if no weighted relationship exists.

criteria.absence_policy: Record an audited absence if no weighted relationship exists.

criteria.absence_policy: The audited snapshot may contain zero duplicates; report that fact.
criteria.title: Duplicate source record

criteria.absence_policy: The audited snapshot may contain zero self-links; report that fact.

selection_policy: Select the lowest stable identity matching each criterion, except explicit highest/lowest weight criteria. Record audited absence rather than fabricating a missing category.
